violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Excessive ice buildup in the back walk in freezer.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Fans and HVAC ductwork in the deli kitchen area have dust buildup.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. -A couple ceiling tiles missing in the back deli area exposing the attic.

Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. -Boxes on the floor of the walk in freezer in the deli. Excessive ice buildup in the back walk in freezer.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Blade on the large can opener in the deli needs cleaned.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. -Ceiling tiles missing in the back area in the deli.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Fans in the deli area are dirty. Fans in the produce walk in cooler are dirty.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
